description: Tests and final integration: Add Python unit tests for the export engine, HTML formatter, and IPC server. Add frontend component tests. Ensure the full project builds cleanly.
steps: Create tests/python/conftest.py with shared pytest fixtures (mock TelegramClient, mock messages, tmp export dirs)
Create tests/python/test_ipc_server.py: Test IPCServer message parsing, handler dispatch, error responses, event sending
Create tests/python/test_export_engine.py: Test ExportConfig creation, _should_download_media logic, formatter selection
Create tests/python/test_html_formatter.py: Test HTML generation with mock messages, date grouping, participant collection
Create tests/python/test_message_fetcher.py: Test batch iteration logic, date filtering
Create tests/python/test_media_downloader.py: Test filename generation, dedup logic, size limit checking
Create tests/python/test_auth.py: Test auth flow state transitions
Ensure pytest.ini or pyproject.toml has proper pytest configuration (asyncio mode, test paths)
Run all Python tests and fix any failures
Verify the full Vite build completes successfully
Verify TypeScript compilation has no errors
acceptance_criteria: All Python tests pass (pytest returns exit code 0)
Vite build produces dist/ directory with index.html and assets
Tests actually test real logic (not just trivial assertions)
